title: US and Iran Work Toward Potential Peace Deal
subtitle: As negotiations continue, global markets wait for signs of stability in the Middle East.

summary.en: The United States and Iran are currently involved in talks to reach a potential peace agreement. The deal aims to address the ongoing conflict and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz. While both sides have reported progress, President Donald Trump has advised negotiators not to rush the process. Global oil markets have reacted to the news, showing signs of relief as prices fell recently. However, experts warn that a final agreement is necessary to prevent further economic damage.
summary.zh: 美國與伊朗目前正進行談判，以達成潛在的和平協議。該協議旨在解決當前的衝突與荷莫茲海峽的封鎖問題。儘管雙方皆表示談判有所進展，川普總統仍建議談判代表切勿操之過急。全球石油市場已對此消息做出反應，隨著近期油價下跌，市場顯露出緩解的跡象。然而，專家警告必須達成最終協議，才能防止進一步的經濟損害。

paragraphs.en: The United States and Iran are currently engaged in delicate negotiations aimed at ending the conflict that began in February. Following months of tension, there is growing hope that a deal could be reached to stop the fighting. According to BBC News, the proposed agreement involves a 60-day ceasefire—an agreement to stop fighting for two months—along with the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and further discussions regarding Iran’s nuclear program.
paragraphs.zh: 美國與伊朗目前正進行細膩的談判，旨在結束自二月開始的衝突。經過數月的緊張局勢，各界對於達成停火協議的希望日益濃厚。根據英國廣播公司新聞網（BBC News）報導，這項擬議中的協議內容包括為期六十天的停火——即雙方同意停止交戰兩個月——以及重新開放荷莫茲海峽，並針對伊朗的核子計畫進行進一步討論。

paragraphs.en: Despite reports that an agreement was close, US President Donald Trump has told his team not to rush. In a social media post, he stated that while talks are moving in a constructive way, both sides must take their time to ensure the deal is correct. Iranian officials have also confirmed that while there is progress, some important points of disagreement remain. As reported by The Guardian, Iranian state media has even suggested that the US government is currently blocking certain parts of the agreement.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管有報導稱協議已接近達成，美國總統川普（Donald Trump）已指示其團隊切勿操之過急。他在社群媒體發文表示，雖然談判正朝建設性方向發展，但雙方必須謹慎行事，以確保協議內容正確無誤。伊朗官員也證實，雖然談判有所進展，但仍存在一些重要的分歧。據《衛報》（The Guardian）報導，伊朗官媒甚至暗示，美國政府目前正在阻撓協議中的某些部分。

paragraphs.en: This potential deal has caused different reactions among American politicians. Some Republicans argue that the agreement might be too soft on Iran. Senator Ted Cruz described the plan as a "disastrous mistake," while Roger Wicker, who leads the Senate Armed Services Committee, expressed concern that a ceasefire would undo the progress made during the military operation known as Operation Epic Fury. On the other hand, Representative Mike Lawler noted that the current administration has successfully forced the Iranian leadership into a real negotiation.
paragraphs.zh: 這項潛在的協議在美國政界引發了不同的反應。部分共和黨人認為該協議對伊朗過於軟弱。參議員克魯茲（Ted Cruz）形容此計畫為「災難性的錯誤」，而參議院軍事委員會主席威克（Roger Wicker）則表達擔憂，認為停火將抵銷代號為「史詩之怒行動」（Operation Epic Fury）的軍事行動所取得的進展。另一方面，眾議員勞勒（Mike Lawler）則指出，現任政府已成功迫使伊朗領導層進行實質談判。

paragraphs.en: For the global economy, the stakes are very high. Since the start of the conflict, Iran has controlled the Strait of Hormuz, a vital waterway for global energy. Around 20% of the world’s oil and liquefied natural gas travels through this route. When Iran effectively closed the strait, it caused global oil prices to rise sharply. The Guardian reports that oil prices recently fell to two-week lows as investors became optimistic about the possibility of a peace deal.
paragraphs.zh: 對於全球經濟而言，此事的利害關係極為重大。自衝突爆發以來，伊朗掌控了全球能源命脈的荷莫茲海峽。全球約百分之二十的石油與液化天然氣皆經由此航道運輸。當伊朗實質封鎖該海峽時，導致全球油價急劇飆升。《衛報》報導指出，由於投資人對和平協議的可能性感到樂觀，油價近期已跌至兩週以來的新低。

paragraphs.en: However, the situation remains fragile. Experts from the International Energy Agency (IEA) have warned that global oil stocks are being used up at a record speed. If the strait remains closed for too long, oil supplies could reach dangerously low levels by the end of June. This could lead to a situation where prices rise so high that businesses and consumers are forced to cut back on energy use, which would cause significant economic harm. Analysts at Capital Economics suggested that if the current trend continues, the price of oil could climb even higher, making a swift resolution essential.
paragraphs.zh: 然而，局勢依然脆弱。國際能源總署（IEA）的專家警告，全球石油庫存正以破紀錄的速度消耗。若海峽持續封鎖過久，石油供應量恐在六月底前降至危險的低點。這可能導致油價飆升至企業與消費者被迫削減能源使用的程度，進而造成嚴重的經濟損害。凱投宏觀（Capital Economics）的分析師建議，若當前趨勢持續，油價可能會進一步攀升，因此迅速解決問題至關重要。

paragraphs.en: Beyond the economic impact, the human cost of the ongoing conflict remains severe. Despite the existence of a ceasefire since April, fighting has continued in several areas. The Guardian reports that Israeli military strikes have hit targets in Lebanon, while Hezbollah has continued its own attacks. Hezbollah’s leader, Naim Qassem, has expressed hope that the agreement between the US and Iran will be finalized soon and that it will include a full end to hostilities in Lebanon.
paragraphs.zh: 除了經濟影響外，持續衝突所造成的人道代價依然慘重。儘管自四月以來已存在停火協議，但多個地區仍持續交戰。《衛報》報導稱，以色列軍方空襲了黎巴嫩境內的目標，而真主黨（Hezbollah）也持續發動攻擊。真主黨領導人卡西姆（Naim Qassem）表示，希望美伊之間的協議能儘快定案，並包含全面結束黎巴嫩境內的敵對行動。

paragraphs.en: President Trump has maintained a firm stance on the negotiations, stating that he will not make a "bad deal." He has also emphasized that the US blockade of Iranian ports will remain in full force until an agreement is signed and certified. Meanwhile, the US continues to demand that Iran stop its efforts to develop a nuclear weapon, a goal that is supported by Israel and other Western allies. Iran, however, continues to insist that its nuclear program is intended only for peaceful purposes.
paragraphs.zh: 川普總統在談判中保持堅定立場，聲明他不會簽署一份「糟糕的協議」。他也強調，在協議簽署並經認證前，美國對伊朗港口的封鎖將持續全面執行。與此同時，美國持續要求伊朗停止發展核武的企圖，此目標亦獲得以色列及其他西方盟友的支持。然而，伊朗堅稱其核子計畫僅用於和平目的。

paragraphs.en: As the world waits for more details, it is clear that the path to peace is complicated. While the recent drop in oil prices shows that markets are hopeful, the disagreements between the two nations mean that a final signature is not yet guaranteed. For now, both Washington and Tehran continue to navigate a difficult diplomatic process, with the global community watching closely to see if a lasting solution can be found to restore stability to the region.
paragraphs.zh: 隨著全球等待更多細節，顯而易見的是，通往和平的道路相當複雜。雖然近期油價下跌顯示市場抱持希望，但兩國之間的分歧意味著最終簽署仍未獲得保證。目前，華盛頓與德黑蘭仍持續在艱難的外交進程中摸索，全球社會正密切關注是否能找到持久的解決方案，以恢復該地區的穩定。

keyTerms.definitionEn: To prevent something from happening or making progress.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（街區），這裡作動詞，指阻礙協議進展。文中：Iranian state media has even suggested that the US government is currently blocking certain parts of the agreement.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To cancel the effect of something that has already been done.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（解開繩結），這裡指使之前的努力失效。文中：expressed concern that a ceasefire would undo the progress made during the military operation known as Operation Epic Fury.

keyTerms.definitionEn: To reduce the amount of something that you use or consume.
keyTerms.noteZh: 片語動詞，意思無法從單字拆解得知。文中：businesses and consumers are forced to cut back on energy use, which would cause significant economic harm.

keyTerms.definitionEn: Strong, steady, and unlikely to change.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（公司），這裡作形容詞，形容立場堅定。文中：President Trump has maintained a firm stance on the negotiations, stating that he will not make a "bad deal."

sources.name: BBC News
sources.title: Trump tells US negotiators 'not to rush' into deal with Iran

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: Middle East crisis live: Trump claims ‘I don’t make bad deals’ as questions remain over negotiation progress

sources.name: The Guardian World
sources.title: With oil markets nearing the danger zone, a US-Iran deal can’t come soon enough | Heather Stewart

quiz.question: According to the article, what is one of the specific components included in the proposed agreement between the US and Iran?

options.A: An immediate and permanent end to all nuclear research in Iran.
options.B: A 60-day period during which military fighting is suspended.
options.C: The complete removal of all US naval blockades on Iranian ports.
options.D: A formal apology from the US government regarding the conflict.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第一段，協議內容明確包含「a 60-day ceasefire」，即為期兩個月的停火協議。選項 A 錯誤，因為文章僅提到「further discussions regarding Iran’s nuclear program」，並未要求立即停止所有研究。選項 C 錯誤，因為文章倒數第二段提到美國將持續封鎖伊朗港口直到協議簽署並認證。選項 D 文章中並未提及。

quiz.question: Based on the information provided, why are global oil prices sensitive to the negotiations between the US and Iran?

options.A: Because Iran has threatened to permanently stop all oil production.
options.B: Because the US has announced a total ban on purchasing Iranian oil.
options.C: Because the current conflict has restricted access to a major maritime energy route.
options.D: Because investors believe the US will soon increase its own oil exports.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。根據文章第四段，伊朗控制了荷姆茲海峽（Strait of Hormuz），這是全球 20% 石油與天然氣運輸的關鍵水道。由於該海峽被封鎖，導致全球油價飆升，因此談判進度直接影響該水道是否能重啟，進而牽動油價。選項 A 與 B 並非文章提到的油價波動主因，選項 D 則完全未在文中提及。

quiz.question: In the fifth paragraph, what does the word 'fragile' most closely mean in the context of the current situation?

options.A: Easily broken or likely to fail.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。文中提到「However, the situation remains fragile」，意指目前的和平進程非常不穩定，隨時可能因為歧見而破裂。fragile 在此處引申為「脆弱的、不穩固的」。選項 B 指的是藝術上的精緻，選項 C 指的是微小，選項 D 指的是身體虛弱，皆不符合外交與經濟局勢的語境。

quiz.question: Which of the following best summarizes the main message of the article?

options.A: The US and Iran have successfully resolved their conflict through a new treaty.
options.B: The global economy is no longer affected by the conflict in the Middle East.
options.C: The path to peace remains uncertain despite ongoing diplomatic efforts and economic pressure.
options.D: President Trump has refused to negotiate with Iran under any circumstances.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 C。全文核心在於討論美伊雙方雖有談判意願，但因歧見深、局勢不穩，和平協議尚未定案。文章結尾也總結「path to peace is complicated」。選項 A 錯誤，因為協議尚未簽署；選項 B 與事實相反，全球經濟仍受影響；選項 D 錯誤，因為文章提到雙方正在進行談判，只是過程謹慎。

aiDisclaimer: 本文由 AI 綜合多家報導生成，事實請以原始來源為準。
